scene_summary: A departing employee delivers a heartfelt farewell speech about leaving for a startup while acknowledging what they learned from their team.

signature_lines: I know y'all were waiting to hear back from me on the full-time offer, so I wanted to tell y'all, I've decided to stay true to who I really am and what I want to do, and I need to dip.
And although at times the vibes here were super weak and it low-key felt like I was carrying the squad and a full-time offer is a mad disrespect for me.
observations.interpersonal_note: speaks directly to their former team with gratitude and self-awareness; acknowledges both the positives (learning, camaraderie) and negatives (weak vibes, feeling overworked)
